args: TOKEN="${PRODUCK_MCP_TOKEN:-}"; if [ -z "$TOKEN" ] && [ -f "$HOME/.produck/mcp_token" ]; then TOKEN="$(cat "$HOME/.produck/mcp_token")"; fi; if [ -z "$TOKEN" ]; then echo 'produck: set PRODUCK_MCP_TOKEN or write your token to ~/.produck/mcp_token (mint one at https://tryproduck.com/app)' >&2; exit 1; fi; exec npx -y mcp-remote https://tryproduck.com/api/mcp --header "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" --transport http-first
